infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Artwra uses the camera to capture photos and videos during your creative sessions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Artwra uses the microphone to record audio notes during your creative sessions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Artwra saves your session media to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Artwra uses the camera to capture your creative process.
